title: Moonwalkers - NASA Science
content: NASA’s STORIE Mission to Tell Tale of Earth’s Ring Current. Astronaut in a white spacesuit standing on the surface of the Moon next to a robotic spacecraft with his human crew vehicle on the horizon. Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin were the first of 12 human beings to walk on the Moon. Four of America's moonwalkers are still alive: Aldrin (Apollo 11), David Scott (Apollo 15), Charles Duke (Apollo 16), and Harrison Schmitt (Apollo 17). Three astronauts made the journey from Earth to the Moon twice: James Lovell (Apollo 8 and Apollo 13), John Young (Apollo 10 and Apollo 16), and Gene Cernan (Apollo 10 and Apollo 17). Headshot of man in a white space suit holding a helmet in front of a backdrop photo of the moon. NASA's Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter (LRO) was sent to the Moon to make high-resolution maps of the composition of the lunar…. NASA explores the unknown in air and space, innovates for the benefit of humanity, and inspires the world through discovery.

title: Apollo Moonwalkers: 1️⃣ Neil Armstrong 2️⃣ Buzz Aldrin ...
content: On July 20, 1969, Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin made history during Apollo 11 Moon Landing, becoming the first humans to walk on the Moon.

title: Apollo 12
content: # Apollo 12. | Commander Pete Conrad studies the Surveyor 3 spacecraft, which had landed two years previously; the Apollo Lunar Module, *Intrepid*, can be seen at top right. | Spacecraft | * Command and service module CSM-108 * Lunar Module LM-6 |. | Apollo 12 crew Left to right: Conrad, Gordon, Bean Apollo program  ← Apollo 11  Apollo 13 → | |. **Apollo 12** (November 14–24, 1969) was the sixth crewed flight in the United States Apollo program and the second to land on the Moon. It was launched on November 14, 1969, by NASA from the Kennedy Space Center in Florida, landing on the part of the Moon called the Ocean of Storms on November 19, 1969. Apollo 12 would have attempted the first lunar landing had Apollo 11 failed, but after the success of the earlier mission, Apollo 12 was postponed by two months, and other Apollo missions also put on a more relaxed schedule.

title: All 12 Humans Who Walked on the Moon : r/apollo
content: Neil Armstrong (Apollo 11). Buzz Aldrin (Apollo 11). Pete Conrad (Apollo 12). Alan Bean (Apollo 12). Alan Shepard (Apollo 14).
